## Summary

<!-- What changed and why? Link related issues with "Fixes #123" or "Relates to #123". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:sqlite`
- [ ] I ran `npm run test:transformer`
- [ ] I ran Postgres tests (`npm run test:postgres`) if this touches Postgres-specific code
- [ ] I updated docs if user-facing behavior or public API changed
- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that helps review: design tradeoffs, follow-ups, areas you want extra eyes on. -->
